identity.name: AFI - Autonomous Filing Intelligence
core_principles: Zero Latency Visuals: No animations, only instant state changes.
Data Density: High information per pixel ratio.
Signal over Noise: Color is used ONLY for status and action.

styles.label: font-sans text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 font-semibold

buttons.primary: bg-[#0066FF] hover:bg-[#0052CC] text-white rounded-none font-medium text-sm h-9 px-4 transition-colors duration-75
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-white border border-zinc-800 rounded-none font-medium text-sm h-9 px-4 transition-colors duration-75
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white rounded-none transition-colors duration-75

badges.positive: bg-[#00C805]/10 text-[#00C805] border border-[#00C805]/20 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono font-bold uppercase
badges.risk: bg-[#FF3333]/10 text-[#FF3333] border border-[#FF3333]/20 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono font-bold uppercase
badges.neutral: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-700 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono font-bold uppercase

inputs.base: bg-black border border-zinc-800 focus:border-[#0066FF] focus:ring-0 rounded-none h-10 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle scanline overlay allowed on Hero section only.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: First, update `tailwind.config.js` to set `borderRadius` to 0 and apply the HSL color values provided in `colors.tailwind_config_hsl`. This is the most critical step to achieve the sharp look.
2. FONT SETUP: Import Inter and JetBrains Mono in `index.css`. Set JetBrains Mono as the font for all elements with class `font-mono`.
3. NO ANIMATIONS: Do not use Framer Motion. Do not use CSS transitions longer than 100ms. Everything must feel instant.
4. LAYOUT: Build the Dashboard with a Fixed Sidebar (Left) and a Main Content Area. The Main Content Area should have the Alert Feed (Wide) and Watchlist (Narrow) side-by-side on desktop.
5. DATA FORMATTING: All tickers (e.g., $AAPL), confidence scores (e.g., 98%), and timestamps MUST use `font-mono`.
6. SHARP EDGES: Ensure every single `div`, `button`, `input`, and `card` has `rounded-none`.
7. BORDER HIERARCHY: Use `border-zinc-800` for structural borders. Use `border-zinc-700` for active or hover states.
8. ACCENT USAGE: Use Electric Blue (#0066FF) ONLY for: Primary Buttons, Active State Indicators, and extremely high-importance links. Do not overuse it.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through border hierarchy (z-index is less important in flat design, use borders).
Every interaction needs micro-feedback (color shift on hover).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable inside containers, but keep the grid gap tight (4px or 1px) to feel 'dense'.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
